name: UBA : Detect IOCs For Locky
notes: Detects user computers that show Indicators of Compromise (IOCs) for Locky by using URLs or IPs that are populated from X-Force campaign feeds.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Log Source Filters
when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Detect Locky Using IP, BB:UBA : Detect Locky Using URL
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Detect IOCs For Locky on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Log Source Filters
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Detect Locky Using IP, BB:UBA : Detect Locky Using URL
RED_list: Event name: UBA : Detect IOCs For Locky
